# Spectral Ratio

**Summary**: A deterministic approach to derive surface-consistent, frequency-dependent de-amplification functions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] used a method similar to the standard spectral ratio technique to develop a new deterministic approach for dune amplification.

## Key Results and Findings

- The proposed method uses a deterministic approach to estimate a frequency dependent de-amplification correction for shots and stations located on the dunes only. ([[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017, p. 35]])
